description_long: This is a dark wooden bookcase with a distinctive hourglass or concave profile, featuring four evenly spaced horizontal shelves and a solid base that also serves as a shelf. The wood grain texture is visible across all surfaces, giving it a rich, natural appearance. The front face is open, allowing easy access to the shelves, while the back is a solid panel that matches the rest of the structure. The sides are flat and narrow, emphasizing the unique inward curve of the main body. The bookcase is designed to stand on the floor and can accommodate books or decorative items. Its modern, sculptural silhouette makes it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or public spaces.
description: A dark, hourglass-shaped wooden bookcase with four open shelves and a solid back panel, featuring a modern, sculptural design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the concave, hourglass profile.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow depth and the inward curve of the bookcase.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and curved shape.
